ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "adult_flea" INTEGER /* Indicates effectiveness against adult fleas */,
  "eggs" INTEGER /* Indicates effectiveness against eggs */,
  "larvae" INTEGER /* Indicates effectiveness against larvae */,
  "tick" INTEGER /* Indicates effectiveness against ticks */,
  "mosquito" INTEGER /* Indicates effectiveness against mosquitoes */,
  "heartworm" INTEGER /* Indicates effectiveness against heartworms */,
  "ear_mite" INTEGER /* Indicates effectiveness against ear mites */,
  "sarcoptic_mange" INTEGER /* Indicates effectiveness against sarcoptic mange */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product and its features */,
  "usage_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for safe and effective usage */,
  "safety_information" TEXT /* Safety information regarding the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product information */,
  "pet_type" TEXT /* Types of pets the product is suitable for */,
  "active_ingredients" TEXT /* List of active ingredients in the product */,
  "recommended_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency of application */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, manager, customer service) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment on the product */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for compliance records */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product for which compliance is recorded */,
  "regulatory_agency" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory agency (e.g., EPA, FDA) */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when compliance was last verified */,
  "compliance_document_url" TEXT /* URL of the compliance document */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next compliance audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Sales region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the inventory record */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last restocked */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "shelf_location" TEXT /* Shelf location of the product in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this detail belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in this order detail */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in this order detail */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in this order detail */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product in this order detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
